author: deacon
text: Root cause identified: lilypad_chat has no refinery/rig directory. The refinery falls back to mayor/rig, causing ROLE/LOCATION MISMATCH (detects as mayor/ instead of refinery/). The agent then tries to cd into refinery/rig and fails. Other rigs (meety_me, rally_tavern, etc.) have refinery/rig as a git worktree. Fix: create refinery/rig worktree for lilypad_chat.
